message:
Fix graph rendering, detect pre-loaded globals, z-index telemetry cards

Graph rendering improvements:
- Hardcode graph height to 650px instead of reading clientHeight (which can
  be 0 before layout completes), and stop ResizeObserver from resetting
  height on resize — only width is dynamic
- Remove per-node canvas shadowColor/shadowBlur calls — shadow operations
  are expensive on canvas and caused visible lag on graphs with 60+ nodes
- Fix node circle radius: use raw `size` instead of `size / globalScale`
  which was causing nodes to shrink to sub-pixel when zoomed in
- Adjust label Y offset from `(size + 5) / globalScale` to
  `size + 5 / globalScale` so labels stay anchored just below the node
  regardless of zoom level

Script detection on mount:
- Remove sqlLoaded from the loadDatabase guard and dependency array —
  loadDatabase is now callable as soon as the db hasn't been initialized,
  letting it be triggered directly by the Script onLoad callback without
  waiting for a state cycle
- Expand the initial useEffect to detect window.d3 and window.ForceGraph
  in addition to window.initSqlJs, so all three pre-loaded globals are
  recognized on navigation-back without needing Script onLoad to re-fire

Telemetry card z-index:
- Add relative z-10 to stat card label, value, and progress bar elements
  so they render above the NeuralPulse background animation overlay

Text alignment:
- Hoist text-left to the main vista grid parent, add it granularly to
  timeline entries, modal description, custodian card, and cascade card

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
